inputs.schema_change: Add a required 'severity' field to the event schema with an enum of debug/info/warning/error.

expected_outputs.migration: Migration: bump event_version note; existing events without severity become invalid. Compatibility: producers must set severity. Provided an invalid fixture missing severity.
expected_outputs.schema_patch:
diff --git a/schemas/event.schema.json b/schemas/event.schema.json
@@ require severity @@
diff --git a/tests/fixtures/invalid-event-missing-severity.json b/tests/fixtures/...
@@ new invalid fixture @@

notes: Evolves a schema with a migration path and an invalid fixture covering the new failure.
